chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 5892 of 2025 [Power Plus Co. Pvt. Ltd., versus FOP and others] Petitioner: Power Plus Co. Private Limited through M/s. Abdul Rahim Lakhani and Atta Mohammad Qureshi, Advocates. Date of hearing: 09-12-2025 Date of decision: 09-12-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Petitioner has challenged a show-cause notice issued by the SECP under section 257 of the Companies Act, 2017. Though, counsel for the Petitioner argues that the show-cause notice is without jurisdiction, prima facie that does not appear to be the case. Nevertheless, all arguments in that regard can be made before the regulator who has issued the show-cause notice. With that observation, petition is dismissed in limine as not maintainable. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
